name: Anne Akiko Meyers
abstract: Anne Akiko Meyers (born May 15, 1970, in San Diego) is an American violinist. Her album Fandango, was awarded two Latin Grammy's for Best Classical Album and Best Contemporary Composition at the 25th Latin Grammy Awards.
